name: Responsive Landing Page
desc: Modern responsive landing page built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript featuring smooth animations, mobile navigation, and a clean user interface.

name: Cafe Delight Menu
desc: A simple and elegant café menu website built using HTML and CSS with organized menu sections and aesthetic design.

name: Advanced Virtual Electrical Lab
desc: Interactive web-based electrical circuit simulator with real-time visualization, fuse protection, and animated user interface.

name: CareTrack
desc: Smart health monitoring application that helps users perform basic health checkups, generate reports, and access emergency assistance.

name: Library Management System
desc: Python-based library management system for book cataloging, issue-return tracking, and user management.

name: ATM System
desc: Menu-driven ATM application developed in Python supporting deposits, withdrawals, balance inquiries, and transaction history.

name: Dice Roll Game
desc: A Python-based dice rolling game built with modular functions and menu-driven architecture for clean code organization.

name: Smart Data Analyzer
desc: Python application for analyzing datasets, generating insights, and processing structured data efficiently.

name: AI Voice Assistant
desc: AI-powered voice assistant built with Python featuring speech recognition, text-to-speech, web automation, and AI integration.

name: Gesture Control AI
desc: Computer vision project using OpenCV and MediaPipe to control volume, scrolling, and navigation through hand gestures.
